The node '10101' corresponds to the region covering indices ix=8-15, iy=8-15, iz=16-23. Leaf nodes that touch a face are the adjacent leaves in the grid, in directions where possible (5 directions: low X, high X, low Y, low Z, high Z; high Y is on the cube boundary). Each adjacent slab has 64 leaves, total 320.
